issues.description: SearchDeck action is incomplete. Missing critical parameters: (1) must specify 'lookAtCount':5 to look at top 5 cards; (2) filter should restrict to {Water Seven} type AND exclude Kokoro by name; (3) missing 'maxSelect':1 to allow 'up to 1' card; (4) missing action to place rest at bottom of deck in any order (requires separate ReturnToHand or similar with 'destination':'deckBottom' and 'order':'any')
